rubric_item_scores.improvement_suggestion: If packet fields can represent combined durations, include a short explicit derivation in the workbook showing the impossibility of splitting 42 min into allowed sub-durations (e.g., max allowed total = 40 min) to remove any residual ambiguity.
rubric_item_scores.notes: Rules (2-8C stable; >8C up to 30 min; <2C up to 10 min; freezing <0C = automatic hold) are quoted in the memo and applied to each carton. C2 (total 42 min outside) necessarily exceeds combined allowable durations (10+30 = 40), so FAIL is correct regardless of how the 42 min splits. C3 is above-8 by 0.4C for 18 min (within 30-min allowance) and was conservatively marked WARN with a recommended clinic signoff - acceptable. C4 freezing (-0.5C) correctly triggers automatic hold.
